{{Quote|Naturally we were hoping to win, especially in front of the home-planet crowd.|[[Jipoly Numifolis]], [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of Team Coruscant|<ref name="Game" />}}
The '''BlasTech Gikosphere''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] stadium on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and home to the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] representative in the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]], [[Team Coruscant]]. The 120,000-seat building was only filled to one-tenth capacity during the Cup's<ref name="Game" /> [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_1.html|Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round}} is set on the date 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> opening round because of the sport's unpopularity on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world. When Coruscant took on the planet of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor's]] visiting [[Team Fondor|team]], the inexperienced Team Coruscant lost the game, with one score to Fondor's three. The stadium was the origin of a [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] article covering the results of the Coruscant–Fondor game and the Galactic Cup's other opening matches that were played across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. A [[Roonan/Legends|Roonan]] was employed at the Gikosphere as a [[Match Master]].<ref name="Game" />

==Behind the scenes==
The BlasTech Gikosphere was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] that was published on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> The article that references the location, titled "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round,"<ref name="Game" /> was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]. The article's picture, depicting Coruscant's game against Fondor, was drawn by [[Joe Corroney]].<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
